titleStmt.title: SII 40.61: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 61. (A.R. No. B. 39a of 1930.) Gāmālapāḍu, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a Nandi pillar lying in front of the ruined Śambhu temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1213, Vikṛiti, Vaiśākha śu. 3, Thursday, corresponding to 1290 A.D., April 13.

Records the gift of land to the god Svayaṁbhūdēva for providing food offerings (ōgirālu) by Dādi Pōcha for the merit of Mallikhārjuna-Nāyaka. Further it records the gift of lands made by two persons viz., Koṭṭāri Appaya and Sōmayādula Rudradēvaya and Rāmadēva for providing food offerings to the same deity in the cyclic year Vikṛiti, Āshāḍha, śu. 1, Thursday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavarṣaṁ
bulu 1213 Agunē
ṁṭi vikṛti saṁvatsara vaiśā
kha śu 3 gu . mallikhārjjuna
nāyaṁkapuvārikiṁ bu
ṇyamugā dādipōcu
ṁgāru svayaṁbhudē
vara mūṁḍavasarāla ba
kkokopaṭlemu Ōgirā
naku sanaṁgakuṁṭa
muṁdaraṁ beṭṭina vi
tti kha 1 bahubhirvvasu
dādattā rājabhissaga
rādibhiḥ . yasya yasya
yadābhūmi stasya tasya ta
dāphalaṁ . svadattāṁ pa
radattāṁ vāyō harēta va
suṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭhā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ
vikṛti saṁvatsara Ā
ṣāḍha śuddha 1 gu ko
ṭṭāri Appaya tana vṛ
ttina 10 svayaṁbhu
dēvara Ōgirānaku
Icēnu . mā
sōmayādula rudradēvaya
gāru svayaṁbhudēvarakuṁ
nu mōṁceli kha 1 vrittigānu dhā
ravośiri . rāmadēvani vāri vri
tti nīru nēla reṁḍu visālu kra
yadhārakoni dēvarakunicciri .
Digital edition of SII 40.61 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
